data.title: Warren Buffett's 2003 Plan To Fix The Trade Deficit Without A War Deserves A Second Look As US-China Tariff War Continues
data.description: Buffett's 2003 article proposed a market-based solution to tackle trade deficit, contrasting with Trump's tariff policies.

data.title: Why United Airlines Shares Are Trading Higher By Over 6%; Here Are 20 Stocks Moving Premarket
'The Ball Is In China's Court': Trump Says As White House Awaits Beijing's Call — 'China Needs To Make A Deal With Us'
data.description: In the latest development in the ongoing U.S.-China trade conflict, U.S. President Donald Trump has called upon China to initiate negotiations.

data.title: S&P 500 Typically Gains 18% In A Year After VIX Drops From 50 To 30 Level: Here's What Analysts Say
data.description: The S&P 500 has given a 17.9% median return each time the CBOE Volatility Index has fallen from over 50 to the 30 level.

data.title: FTC Launches Public Inquiry After Trump Issues Executive Order To Eliminate Anticompetitive Regulations That Favor Monopolies, Raise Consumer Costs
data.description: The FTC launched a public inquiry into federal regulations that may hinder competition after President Trump's order.
